title: Red Effects
description: This mod adds Impact Frames when a Mace Smash is performed. It also adds a weapon spinning animation when falling. Both effects are heavily inspired by ultrakill.
body:
# Showcase

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pRI5pg7kI4g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Features
- **Impact Freeze Frame:** Freezes de Frame after a smash hit. This only affects rendering, not gameplay. Duration of the effect can be changed.
- **Falling Weapon Spinning:** Spins the held weapon (sword, axe or mace) if falling for more than 1.5 blocks. Rotation speed can be changed and can be toggled off.
- **Keybind Weapon Spinning:** Spins the held weapon (sword, axe or mace) if holding a key.
